---
title: "Talks"
description: "Talks, workshops, and presentations."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: false
---

## GitHub talks

Auto-pulled from repos whose README front-matter includes `type: talk`.

```{r github-talks}
#| output: asis
source("../_helpers/gh_type_cards.R")
render_gh_type_cards("talk")
```
